summary: Both REQ-1 (backend upgradeCurrentUserToAdmin function) and REQ-2 (frontend /admin/upgrade route) appear to be implemented. The backend main.mo was modified to add the new function, and the frontend has a new AdminUpgradePage.tsx, a new useUpgradeToAdmin hook in useQueries.ts, and App.tsx was updated with the new route. The implementation looks largely complete, though the backend diff is truncated so full verification of the backend function internals is limited.

hallucinated_features.description: The admin code input field is rendered as a password input (type='password') which hides the entered characters
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify that the input should be of type 'password'. It only requests a text input labelled 'Enter Admin Setup Code'. Using type='password' is an unrequested UX addition.

hallucinated_features.description: Enter key press triggers the upgrade action via an onKeyDown handler
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies that clicking the 'Upgrade to Admin' button should call the backend function. Keyboard shortcut behavior was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: A ShieldCheck icon, loading spinner, CardDescription, and other decorative UI elements are included in AdminUpgradePage
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only specifies a title 'Admin Upgrade', a text input labelled 'Enter Admin Setup Code', and a button labelled 'Upgrade to Admin'. Additional decorative elements were not requested.
